inputs.label: Current Annual Dividend Per Share
inputs.businessContext: The most recent annual dividend payment per share in dollars.

businessContext_i18n.en: The most recent annual dividend payment per share in dollars.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hisse başına en son yıllık temettü ödemesi, dolar cinsinden.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die letzte jährliche Dividendenzahlung pro Aktie in Dollar.

inputs.label: Expected Dividend Growth Rate
inputs.businessContext: The anticipated annual growth rate of the dividend, expressed as a percentage.

businessContext_i18n.en: The anticipated annual growth rate of the dividend, expressed as a percentage.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Temettünün beklenen yıllık büyüme oranı, yüzde olarak ifade edilir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die erwartete jährliche Wachstumsrate der Dividende, ausgedrückt in Prozent.

inputs.label: Required Rate of Return
inputs.businessContext: The investor's required rate of return or discount rate, expressed as a percentage.

businessContext_i18n.en: The investor's required rate of return or discount rate, expressed as a percentage.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yatırımcının gerekli getiri oranı veya iskonto oranı, yüzde olarak ifade edilir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die vom Anleger geforderte Rendite oder Diskontsatz, ausgedrückt in Prozent.

inputs.label: Number of Years
inputs.businessContext: The number of years into the future for which the dividend is projected.

businessContext_i18n.en: The number of years into the future for which the dividend is projected.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Temettünün tahmin edildiği gelecekteki yıl sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Anzahl der Jahre in die Zukunft, für die die Dividende prognostiziert wird.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
